Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2500 "VELOCIPEDEII-2500" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Velocipede II.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $2500 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers, so the execution can start at the point the loader has finished and start the game. 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program.
Note: to dump, simply set a breakpoint on $A7AE after the first part of the game has loaded.
